items.text: The US government announced a $5 billion program to apply AI to tackling chronic diseases and accelerating drug discovery and development.
items.text_zh: 美国政府宣布投入 50 亿美元，利用 AI 攻克慢性病并加速药物研发。

items.text: Meta rolled out its own AI-content detection and labeling system, which The Verge's testing found notably less reliable than Google's SynthID watermarking.
items.text_zh: Meta 上线自研的 AI 内容检测与标注系统，但 The Verge 实测发现其可靠性明显不及 Google 的 SynthID 水印方案。

items.text: Tencent is reportedly merging the teams behind its two AI products Workbuddy and QClaw to consolidate overlapping efforts.
items.text_zh: 消息称腾讯正整合 Workbuddy 与 QClaw 两款 AI 产品的团队，收拢重叠业务。

items.text: Security startup Glow emerged from stealth at a $1.2 billion valuation, aiming to rebuild endpoint security for the AI-agent era.
items.text_zh: 安全初创公司 Glow 结束隐身模式，以 12 亿美元估值亮相，瞄准 AI Agent 时代重构终端安全。

items.text: Robotics startup Gritt exited stealth with $32 million to build robots that construct solar plants, with plans to expand into broader construction.
items.text_zh: 机器人初创公司 Gritt 结束隐身，携 3200 万美元融资打造建设光伏电站的机器人，后续计划拓展至更多施工场景。

items.text: Cisco Foundation AI released Antares, open-weight 350M and 1B models for localizing known vulnerabilities in codebases, with the 1B beating 753B GLM-5.2 at up to 172x lower cost.
items.text_zh: 思科 Foundation AI 发布 Antares 开源权重模型（350M 与 1B），专用于在代码库中定位已知漏洞，1B 版本以最高低 172 倍的成本超过 753B 的 GLM-5.2。

items.text: An unconfirmed rumor of a deal between Anthropic and robotics startup Physical Intelligence swept AI Twitter, with neither company commenting.
items.text_zh: 一则关于 Anthropic 与机器人初创公司 Physical Intelligence 达成交易的未证实传闻席卷 AI 推特圈，两家公司均未回应。

items.text: Tencent's open-weight Hy3 ranked #5 among open models in LMArena's Agent Arena (#25 overall) and #2 open model in the Frontend Code Arena, based on 8K+ live agentic sessions.
items.text_zh: 腾讯开源权重模型 Hy3 在 LMArena Agent Arena 开源模型中排名第 5（总榜第 25），前端代码竞技场开源第 2，成绩基于 8000 多场真实 Agent 会话。

items.text: Fireworks AI's benchmark found open-source Kimi K3 nearly matches Claude Fable 5 overall, and routing between the two beats either alone at up to ~50x lower cost.
items.text_zh: Fireworks AI 评测显示，开源的 Kimi K3 整体准确率几乎追平 Claude Fable 5，而在两者间智能路由的效果超过任一单模型，成本最多可低约 50 倍。

items.text: Substack integrated Pangram's AI detector so readers can check whether newsletters and blogs were written by AI.
items.text_zh: Substack 接入 Pangram 的 AI 检测器，让读者可以查验新闻通讯和博客是否由 AI 撰写。

items.text: OpenAI quietly opened an advertising portal at ads.openai.com, inviting brands to buy ad placements inside ChatGPT.
items.text_zh: OpenAI 低调上线广告门户 ads.openai.com，邀请品牌方购买 ChatGPT 内的广告位。

items.text: Nubank founder David Vélez and BNY chief Robin Vince joined the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC.
items.text_zh: Nubank 创始人 David Vélez 与纽约梅隆银行掌门 Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI 基金会及 OpenAI Group PBC 董事会。

items.text: OpenAI published "Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models," outlining its approach to risks from models that act autonomously over extended time horizons.
items.text_zh: OpenAI 发布《长时程模型时代的安全与对齐》，阐述其应对可长时间自主行动的模型所带来风险的思路。

items.text: Cursor doubled usage limits for all individual and teams plans, covering Grok, Composer, and its upcoming in-house models.
items.text_zh: Cursor 将所有个人版与团队版套餐的用量上限翻倍，覆盖 Grok、Composer 及其即将推出的自研模型。

items.text: Cursor had a team of AI agents rebuild SQLite in Rust from its 835-page manual, producing a replica that passed 100% of a held-out test suite.
items.text_zh: Cursor 让一组 AI Agent 仅凭 835 页官方手册用 Rust 重写 SQLite，复刻版本通过了 100% 的留出测试集。

items.text: Anthropic is offering grants of up to $50,000 in Claude usage credits to researchers working on cures for rare diseases, its first focused AI-for-science call.
items.text_zh: Anthropic 向攻关罕见病疗法的研究者提供最高 5 万美元的 Claude 用量额度资助，这是其 AI for Science 计划的首个定向征集。

items.text: NVIDIA released Cosmos 3 Edge, a 4B-parameter open world model that reasons about physical scenes and generates robot actions on-device at 15 Hz on Jetson Thor.
items.text_zh: 英伟达发布 Cosmos 3 Edge：4B 参数的开源世界模型，可在 Jetson Thor 上以 15Hz 端侧推理物理场景并生成机器人动作。

items.text: Music streamer Deezer said more than 50% of tracks uploaded to its platform daily are now fully AI-generated.
items.text_zh: 音乐流媒体 Deezer 表示，其平台如今每日上传的曲目中超过 50% 为完全 AI 生成。

items.text: Xiaomi's Xiaomi-Robotics-1 model shows that scaling training data beats scaling model size when teaching robots manipulation skills.
items.text_zh: 小米的 Xiaomi-Robotics-1 模型表明，在训练机器人操作技能时，扩大训练数据比扩大模型规模更有效。

items.text: Apple researchers published a method to generate synthetic training data for API-calling agents without needing live execution environments.
items.text_zh: Apple 研究人员发布新方法，无需真实执行环境即可为 API 调用类 Agent 生成合成训练数据。

items.text: Synthesia is expanding its AI corporate-training platform beyond avatar videos into interactive live coaching sessions.
items.text_zh: Synthesia 将其 AI 企业培训平台从数字人视频拓展至互动式实时辅导场景。
